title: Bismillah
overview: It focuses on the tradition of a musical family and how foreign intrusion creates disturbance in it. “A musician not only goes through music but his or her surroundings and environment molds him or her growth as well. With the growth, his or her music begins to take a shape and changes too," A musical spectacle featuring mega stars and melodious voices contributed by leading singers of Indian Film Industry.
